name: data-tuyensinh
displayDescription: Full-stack university admission data management system. Helps Vietnamese university admissions offices analyze and manage applicant data efficiently. Features dashboards with Nivo/ECharts heatmaps, Elasticsearch full-text search, Excel import/export, and Better Auth RBAC. Contains 2 parts: React + MUI frontend with data visualization, and Express + Prisma + PostgreSQL + Redis backend. Dockerized with production compose.
